what_it_does: This file is a minimal channel-attachment metadata record that links an image asset to the design-source channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
Attachment id att-b802a9d2 with an att- prefix
target is an image:// URI pointing to design-source/recent-pitches/p-15
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with microsecond precision
standouts: The target uses an image:// URI scheme for an image asset
It ties an image to the design-source channel under recent-pitches/p-15
It is purely a typed pointer with no descriptive content
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Id prefix att- suggests an attachment namespace
Uses a custom image:// URI scheme for asset addressing
Minimal stub file with no prose body
concerns: The image:// target cannot be resolved or verified from this file alone
No title, caption, alt text, or MIME type is provided
No author or provenance beyond the timestamp
The meaning of p-15 is not explained here
notes: A bare metadata stub that points the design-source channel at an image asset for a recent pitch.
questions: What image format or dimensions does the target have?

purpose_vs_actual: There is no explicit stated purpose beyond the metadata fields; the file actually functions as a typed, timestamped pointer from the design-source channel to an image asset.
apparent_themes: Custom URI addressing for design assets
intention_signals: It appears intended to register an image asset as an attachment to the design-source channel, likely so a pitch image can be discovered alongside channel memory.
novelty: The use of an image:// URI and an att- prefixed attachment stub is the main distinctive feature; otherwise it is a conventional metadata record.
contribution: This file contributes a timestamped, typed link between a channel and an image asset, which a fused system could keep as a provenance record for locating pitch-related images.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record with id att-b802a9d2 in the design-source channel pointing to image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-15 and an added timestamp.
